framework_name: US State Privacy Laws — Processor/Service Provider Obligations

requirements.name: Written Processor Contract
requirements.description: A processor must be bound by a contract with the controller that clearly sets forth instructions for processing data, the nature and purpose of processing, the type of data subject to processing, the duration of processing, and the rights and obligations of both parties.
expected_provisions: Written contract between controller and processor executed
Instructions for processing personal data clearly stated
Nature and purpose of processing described
Type of personal data subject to processing identified
Duration of processing specified
Rights and obligations of both parties set forth

requirements.name: Duty of Confidentiality
requirements.description: The processor must ensure that each person processing the data is subject to a duty of confidentiality with respect to the data.
expected_provisions: Personnel processing personal data are bound by confidentiality obligations
Confidentiality obligations cover all individuals with access to personal data

requirements.name: Deletion or Return of Personal Data
requirements.description: At the direction of the controller, the processor shall delete or return all personal data at the end of the provision of services, unless retention is required by law.
expected_provisions: Personal data deleted or returned at controller's direction upon termination
Processor deletes existing copies unless retention required by law
Reasonable timeframe for deletion or return specified

requirements.name: Demonstration of Compliance / Audit Rights
requirements.description: The processor must make available to the controller, upon request, all information in its possession necessary to demonstrate the processor's compliance with its obligations. The processor shall allow and cooperate with reasonable assessments by the controller or the controller's designated assessor.
expected_provisions: Processor provides information to demonstrate compliance upon request
Processor allows reasonable assessments or audits by controller
Controller may use designated third-party assessor
Reasonable notice period for assessments

requirements.name: Subcontractor Obligations
requirements.description: The processor shall engage any subcontractor pursuant to a written contract that requires the subcontractor to meet the obligations of the processor with respect to the personal data.
expected_provisions: Subcontractors engaged under written contract with equivalent obligations
Controller notified of material subcontractor changes
Processor remains responsible for subcontractor compliance

requirements.name: Data Protection Assessment Cooperation
requirements.description: Processors must cooperate with controllers to conduct data protection assessments when required for processing that presents a heightened risk of harm to consumers.
expected_provisions: Processor cooperates with controller on data protection assessments
Processor provides information necessary for assessments

requirements.name: Assistance with Consumer Rights Requests
requirements.description: Processors must assist controllers in fulfilling consumer rights requests including the right to access, correct, delete, and obtain a copy of personal data, and the right to opt out of targeted advertising, sale of personal data, or profiling.
expected_provisions: Processor assists controller in responding to consumer rights requests
Support for access, correction, and deletion requests
Support for opt-out of sale, targeted advertising, and profiling
Timely assistance provided within legally required response periods

requirements.name: Data Security Obligations
requirements.description: Processors must implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect personal data, appropriate to the volume, scope, and nature of the personal data processed.
expected_provisions: Appropriate technical and organizational security measures implemented
Security measures appropriate to volume, scope, and nature of data
Breach notification to controller required in event of security incident
